description: patcher_regex_bug: patch_paramcard.py _set_block_value() regex '^\\s*<idx>\\s+(?!\\d)' fails to match/update existing param_card entries with positive values (0.0, 1.0, etc.) on MG5-generated cards with single-space format '    i v'. Only entries with double-space format (patcher's own output) or negative values match. Affects: DMSECTOR (gchi stays 0.0), PHASES (rpchiR stays 0.0, DM coupling zeroed), MASS BSM particles (stay at 100 GeV), HMIX VEVs (vd/vu stay 0), ZAMIX/ZHMIX/ZPMIX (stay all-zero). Net effect: Omega h^2=-1 sentinel on first fresh run.
auto_repro_command: python3 -c "import re; print(bool(re.match(r'^\\s*2\\s+(?!\\d)', '    2 0.000000e+00 # gchi\\n')))"  # should be False

fix_attempts.outcome: workaround: manually fixed DMSECTOR, PHASES, MASS, HMIX, ZAMIX, ZHMIX, ZPMIX, MHm1 directly in demo_output/2hdm-a/maddm_run/Cards/param_card.dat

observed_impact: Omega h^2=-1 (all channels NaN) without workaround; 10.494 after workaround

description: flock_not_available_on_macos: SKILL.md and plan mandate 'flock -x -w 120' for SARAH mutex, but flock is not available on macOS (util-linux package absent). Used 'lockf -k -t 120' as substitute. The lock file must pre-exist for lockf; created manually before invocation.
observed_impact: Minor: had to use lockf instead of flock; functionally equivalent

description: omega_h2_outside_band: Computed Omega h^2=10.494 vs synthesis-locked target 10.15 (band [9.95,10.36]). Deviation: +3.4%. Dominant channel: wphp+wmhm (gauge) at 99.2% vs expected bbx at ~60%. Physics explanation: Ah2 is singlet-dominated (ZA[2,1]=cb*sa=0.010 small), so b-quark Yukawa coupling to Ah2 is suppressed. The gauge coupling Ah2-W-H dominates. The iter-8 reference result of 10.15 was produced under different effective param_card conditions (possibly patcher wrote duplicate ZAMIX entries with non-zero values). Channel fraction bbx=0.65% fails >=30% gate.
observed_impact: G1 (omega band) fails; G_channel (bbx>=30%) fails. MadDM ran successfully and produced finite Omega h^2.

description: maddm_launch_script_invocation: Running 'mg5_aMC --mode=maddm launch_script.cmd' with 'launch -f' fails with AttributeError NoneType.get because model is not loaded in fresh session. Correct form is 'launch <out_dir> -f' which triggers MG5 to reload state from out_dir. Also: the first launch attempt (attempt 1) was run from setup.mg5 directory which doesn't have the model loaded. The two-phase approach in SKILL.md requires the second script to use 'launch <full_path_to_out_dir> -f', not 'launch -f'.
observed_impact: Minor: first launch attempt failed with AttributeError; worked on second attempt with 'launch <out_dir> -f'
